seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("\n=== End area ===")
for i in range(54, 62):
    print(f"Row {i}: '{ascii_lines[i][24:32]}'")

# Check the white path area

for i in range(48, 58):
    row_str = ascii_lines[i][24:32]
    if 'w' in row_str or 'W' in row_str or 'M' in row_str:
        print(f"Row {i}: '{row_str}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
predict(expect_change=True, note='Clicking magenta (56,27) again after path flipped')
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 56, 'col': 27}])
print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")

# Check diff
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame
before_ascii = before.ascii.split('\n')
after_ascii = after.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== DIFF ===")
changed = False
for i in range(64):
    if before_ascii[i] != after_ascii[i]:
        for j in range(64):
            if before_ascii[i][j] != after_ascii[i][j]:
                start = j
                break
        for j in range(63, -1, -1):
            if before_ascii[i][j] != after_ascii[i][j]:
                end = j
                break
        print(f"Row {i}: '{before_ascii[i][start:end+1]}' -> '{after_ascii[i][start:end+1]}'")
        changed = True
if not changed:
    print("Only timer changed")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
